executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 62 threat advisories. Of these, 5 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 32 as HIGH risk. 3 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
